response.overview: # Translation  Jaden (Adam Lee) is an orphan who works as a personal bodyguard for Datuk Samsul Azri. One day, Jaden is attacked by Datuk Samsul Azri after being accused of having a relationship with his mistress, Ariana (Anies Hann). Jaden is beaten severely until he suffers serious injuries and is thrown into a rubber plantation belonging to Pak Samad (Omar Abdullah). Since that incident, Jaden's life in the village has been taken care of by Pak Samad and Seri Dhia (Sweet Qismina), including his food and drinks. Jaden eventually falls in love with Seri Dhia. Seri Dhia's engagement to Dr. Iqram is called off when Puan Zalina, Dr. Iqram's mother, accuses Seri Dhia of having a romantic relationship with Jaden. Seri Dhia is upset with Dr. Iqram for accepting the accusation without question. After four months of knowing each other, Jaden and Seri Dhia confess their feelings for each other with open hearts. In the sweetness, there is always hidden bitterness.
response.title: Bukan Lelaki Terhebat
